children.heading: Establishment; appointment of Director
children.label: a Establishment; appointment of Director
children.text: There is hereby established in the Commission an Office of Nuclear Reactor Regulation under the direction of a Director of Nuclear Reactor Regulation, who shall be appointed by the Commission, who may report directly to the Commission, as provided in , and who shall serve at the pleasure of and be removable by the Commission.section 5849 of this title

Principal licensing and regulation involving all facilities, and materials licensed under the Atomic Energy Act of 1954, as amended [ et seq.], associated with the construction and operation of nuclear reactors licensed under the Atomic Energy Act of 1954, as amended;42 U.S.C. 2011

children.label: A
children.text: monitoring, testing and recommending upgrading of systems designed to prevent substantial health or safety hazards; and

children.label: B
children.text: evaluating methods of transporting special nuclear and other nuclear materials and of transporting and storing high-level radioactive wastes to prevent radiation hazards to employees and the general public.
Recommend research necessary to fulfill the licensing and regulatory oversight functions of the Commission.

establish techniques and guidance for evaluating applications for licenses for nuclear reactors to support efficient, timely, and predictable reviews of applications for those licenses to enable the safe and secure use of nuclear reactors;
maintain the techniques and guidance established under paragraph (1) by periodically assessing and, if necessary, modifying those techniques and guidance; and
obtain approval from the Commission if establishment or modification of the techniques and guidance under paragraph (1) or (2) involves policy formulation.

children.heading: Responsibility for safe operation of facilities
children.label: d Responsibility for safe operation of facilities
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit in any way the functions of the Administration relating to the safe operation of all facilities resulting from all activities within the jurisdiction of the Administration pursuant to this chapter.
